Featured Work

Projects

Selected hardware projects — designed, built, and documented.

01
ASTRA Humanoid Robot

A fully functional humanoid robot built around Raspberry Pi Pico. Designed the complete 3D-printed mechanical structure, servo-driven joint system, and MicroPython firmware from the ground up. Covers kinematics, real-time motion control, and structural fabrication.

Raspberry Pi PicoMicroPython3D PrintingServo ControlRobotics
View on GitHub ↗
↗
02
Digital Storage Oscilloscope

Prototype DSO built on Arduino Uno handling real-time signal acquisition, ADC sampling, and live waveform rendering. Developed to gain deep understanding of analog-to-digital conversion, signal timing, and display driver implementation.

Arduino UnoADC / Signal ProcessingC++Display InterfaceTest & Measurement
View on GitHub ↗
